## Reference Anchors

- [Bayesian Online Changepoint Detection](../references/papers/0710.3742_bayesian_online_changepoint_detection.pdf) - bayesian, regime, monitoring
- [Multivariate Bayesian Structural Time Series Model](../references/papers/1801.03222_multivariate_bsts.pdf) - bayesian, macro, regime
- [View fusion vis-à-vis a Bayesian interpretation of Black-Litterman for portfolio allocation](../references/papers/2301.13594_black_litterman_fusion.pdf) - bayesian, portfolio
- [On the Profitability of Optimal Mean Reversion Trading Strategies](../references/papers/1602.05858_mean_reversion_optimal.pdf) - sde, mean_reversion, pairs
- [Mean Reversion Trading with Sequential Deadlines and Transaction Costs](../references/papers/1707.03498_mean_reversion_deadlines.pdf) - sde, mean_reversion, execution
- [The Heston stochastic volatility model with piecewise constant parameters - efficient calibration and pricing of window barrier options](../references/papers/1805.04704_heston_piecewise_constant.pdf) - sde, volatility
- [Parameter Estimation of the Heston Volatility Model with Jumps in the Asset Prices](../references/papers/2211.14814_heston_jumps.pdf) - sde, volatility, jump
- [Playing Atari with Deep Reinforcement Learning](../references/papers/1312.5602_dqn.pdf) - rl
- [Proximal Policy Optimization Algorithms](../references/papers/1707.06347_ppo.pdf) - rl
- [Soft Actor-Critic Algorithms and Applications](../references/papers/1812.05905_sac.pdf) - rl
- [Adversarial Deep Reinforcement Learning in Portfolio Management](../references/papers/1808.09940_adversarial_drl_portfolio.pdf) - rl, portfolio
- [Model-based Deep Reinforcement Learning for Dynamic Portfolio Optimization](../references/papers/1901.08740_model_based_drl_portfolio.pdf) - rl, portfolio
- [LightGBM: A Highly Efficient Gradient Boosting Decision Tree](../references/papers/lightgbm_neurips_2017.pdf) - financial_dl, tabular, baseline
- [DeepLOB: Deep Convolutional Neural Networks for Limit Order Books](../references/papers/1808.03668_deeplob.pdf) - financial_dl, hft
- [Multi-Horizon Forecasting for Limit Order Books: Novel Deep Learning Approaches and Hardware Acceleration using Intelligent Processing Units](../references/papers/2105.10430_lob_multi_horizon.pdf) - financial_dl, hft
- [Temporal Fusion Transformers for Interpretable Multi-horizon Time Series Forecasting](../references/papers/1912.09363_temporal_fusion_transformer.pdf) - financial_dl, time_series
- [Market Making with Deep Reinforcement Learning from Limit Order Books](../references/papers/2305.15821_market_making_rl_lob.pdf) - hft, rl
- [Deep Learning can Replicate Adaptive Traders in a Limit-Order-Book Financial Market](../references/papers/1811.02880_adaptive_traders_lob.pdf) - hft, financial_dl

## What This Means

- The repository is executable in research/mock/offline mode.
- The documentation inventory is now grounded by downloaded paper references and by the concrete code paths above.
- Detailed primary candidate dossiers are published in `./07_candidate_dossiers.md` with a folder guide in `./candidates/README.md` and individual markdown files under `./candidates/`.
- Paper/live trading still needs external credentialed validation before it can be called production-ready.
